message:
feat(bench): Add cancel/drain latency benchmarks (bd-19rj)

New cancel_drain_bench criterion suite with 7 benchmark groups measuring
governor overhead, cancel dispatch latency, and state snapshot costs.
Key finding: governor suggest() is ~7ns, negligible vs scheduling cost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -189,6 +189,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "egraph_benchmark"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "cancel_drain_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [lints.rust]
 # Default to deny for unsafe code - specific modules that require it can use #[allow(unsafe_code)]
 # The epoll reactor requires unsafe for the polling crate's FFI operations
